title: Quickstart template for Python framework like Flask/Django/Streamlit
excerpt: Is a quickstart template for Python Flask or Django or Streamlit in the works? The only ones so far are TypeScript and Node.js.

posts.author: Human42 (Joseph Alexander Philip Zaldarriaga Lacson)
posts.cookedHtml: Is a quickstart template for Python Flask or Django or Streamlit in the works? The only ones so far are TypeScript and Node.js.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Human42 and welcome to the community

I hope you like it here!

This is not something that you will see in the nearest future.

Having said that, I will make sure to share your request with our team so that we can take it into account

Cheers,
Matias
